resources.string: Point your camera at an Indonesian Rupiah note placed on a flat surface. The app will try to detect it and show you information about its features and history.
Once an information card appears in AR, you can tap and drag it to move it around. Use two fingers to pinch-to-zoom to resize the card.

Tap the \'Start Quiz\' button to test your knowledge about Indonesian Rupiah! When in quiz mode, tap the screen where you would normally see a currency (or on a detected plane). A currency card will appear along with a question. Select your answer from the options provided.
The \'ML Output: ...\' text at the bottom of the screen shows general objects and patterns the app\'s image recognition currently sees. This helps the app decide when to show currency information.

- Ensure good, even lighting on the currency note.
- Hold your camera steady.
- Flat, unfolded notes work best for detection.
- Try different angles if detection is slow.
This app requires Camera permission to provide the Augmented Reality experience and to analyze currency notes. Internet permission may be used for future updates or model downloads.
This app is for educational purposes only and should not be used for counterfeit detection or financial transactions.
